dashboard.title: Dashboard y'Ikigo
dashboard.welcomeMessage: Ikaze kuri dashboard nyamukuru ya Kiini - uburyo bwo gucunga ibigo, amashami, n'abakozi.

institution.title: Umwirondoro w'Ikigo
institution.description: Reba kandi ucunge amakuru y'ikigo cyawe

businesses_section.title: Ubucuruzi bw'Ikigo
businesses_section.none: Nta bucuruzi buracyaboneka muri iki kigo

departments.title: Gucunga Amashami
departments.description: Shiraho, hindura, kandi usibe amashami mu kigo cyawe.

staff.title: Abakozi
staff.description: Reba kandi ucunge amakuru y'abakozi b'ikigo.

tiers.title: Ibyiciro by'Ikigo
tiers.description: Urutonde rw'ibyiciro biboneka ku bigo nka Gito, Hagati, Kinini.

types.title: Ubwoko bw'Ibigo
types.description: Reba cyangwa uhitemo ubwoko bw'ikigo nk'isosiyete yigenga, umuryango utari uwa Leta, cyangwa ikigo cya Leta.
